items.caption: A vibrant poster promoting the importance of vaccination in the context of the european immunization week. the central message, "vaccination helps children grow into healthy adults," is prominently displayed in white text against an orange background. the poster features a lively cartoon illustration of children and adults, each engaged in different activities, symbolizing the diverse aspects of life that vaccination can protect. the world health organization's logo is visible, indicating their endorsement of the message. the overall design is engaging and informative, aiming to raise awareness about the benefits of vaccination.
